title: Durability Indicator
description: Adds Durability into tooltip and/or displays current durability over the durability bar on the item.
body:
This Mod adds more functions to the durability bar on items and let the user show the current durability of his tool and armor not only with the minecraft styled bar. Inspired by the Durability101 Mod.

**Functions**
- Durability and its left percentage can be shown in the tooltip
- Adds numbers to be shown above the durability bar how much durability the tool or armor piece have left
- Toggling on or off the durability in tooltip or over the durability bar
- Change color of each percentage (100, 75, 50, 25%) at which it will change


Report any issues with the mod or conflicts with other mods into the linked issue tracker, that i can fix it as soon as possible.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

More features, configurables and other mod loaders and versions will be added in the future

</details>
